name: AsqPanel
title: ASQ Panel Code (local)
description: SPiER-local code identifying the NIMH ASQ screening instrument at the panel/root level. Used because the ASQ has NO published panel LOINC code. The code that previously sat on this Questionnaire's root, LOINC 93373-9, is the C-SSRS screener panel (https://loinc.org/93373-9/panel) — a different instrument — and must not be used to identify ASQ. This local code lets a FHIR client recognize 'this is an ASQ screening' by code rather than by string-matching the title. Replace with a published LOINC panel code if/when NIMH/Regenstrief assign one.

concept.definition: The NIMH Ask Suicide-Screening Questions instrument as a whole (4 screening questions plus acuity question).
